title: Touhou Little Maid:GrowableOres Compat
description: Use task make maid can heavest ore cane.
body:
**A simple compatibility mod using task make maid can heavest ore cane.**   
**Requires Touhou Little Maid and GrowableOres.**  
  
This mod add a task can make maid heavest ore cane.  

![ 2026-01-15 181438.png](https://s2.loli.net/2026/01/15/6sNI9etMr5f2pkV.png)  


**For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!**
